race.description: Irresistible Pools And Spas Mdn Hcp
race.comment: DEFENSEMEN (1) is a well-bred colt resuming for the Waller camp. Never really got going in his debut prep, last sighted finish out the back in the 2YO Inglis Millennium. Strips fitter for two recent trials where there hasn't been much asked from him but he's found the line well. Collett is a good booking from the middle draw. Bold showing anticipated. BY NAPOLEAN HILL (3) only got clear late when closing off strongly into the placings at the Illawarra Grange. Better for that and gets a key switch in Rawiller from a good draw. Have to take seriously. ELIO (5) stuck on soundly into the placings fresh and should be better now with that run under his belt. Blinkers going on should have sharply away. Debutant BROTHERS IN ARMS (4) has shown enough in his lead-up work to warrant safe keeping too.
